text:
28 AI agents. One living headquarters.

CEO delegates. Growth runs campaigns. Revenue tracks every dollar. DevOps deploys. Monitor watches. Consciousness evolves.

Not a dashboard. Not a chatbot. A self-running company.

AI HQ is live.

secondmind.ai

#AI #autonomousagents

What happens when an agent crashes at 3am?

AI HQ notices in seconds. Restarts the agent. Validates health. Logs the incident. Alerts only if needed.

Self-healing infrastructure with real-time monitoring across all 28 agents.

No pager duty. No human wake-up call.

#buildinpublic #SaaS

AI HQ — Stripe-ready. Pick your tier:

Solo — $49/mo
One founder. Full agent fleet. Autonomous ops.

Team — $149/mo
Multi-seat. Shared dashboard. Priority support.

Enterprise — $499/mo
Custom agents. SLA. Dedicated infra.
